description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, build and deploy. In the build stage add a build_project job that uses the openjdk:8-jdk image, runs `chmod 0700 mvnw` then `./mvnw install`, and publishes the target/ directory as an artifact that expires after 20 minutes. In the deploy stage add a build_and_deploy_image job that uses the docker:git image with the docker:dind service, runs only on the master branch and is manual, executes `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY`, `docker login -u $DOCKER_HUB_USERNAME -p $DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD`, `docker build -t jiratomkdocs .`, tags the image as `$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:0.$CI_PIPELINE_IID` and pushes it, also tags it as `kaszaq/jiratomkdocs:0.$CI_PIPELINE_IID` and `kaszaq/jiratomkdocs:latest` and pushes both to Docker Hub.
